column2: **Description**: When DAO sets a user's score via `setScore`, no history snapshot is recorded. The user's `lastActivity` isn't updated either. Combined with #177/#178, DAO-promoted users cannot vote in DAO because their effective score for governance reads zero (no recent activity).

column2: The most consequential single finding is **#391 — AdminMultiSig is deployed but never wired into the protocol.** Every "deployer holds X" finding from rounds 1-19 stands as written: there is no multisig backstop. Once this is fixed, many other findings reduce in severity (the deployer compromise model becomes a 3-of-5 council compromise model).
